int32_t sub_744(int32_t arg1, int32_t arg2, int32_t arg3, int32_t arg4)
{
    bool z;
    
    if (z)
        arg4 = syscall();
    
    bool n;
    
    if (!n)
        *(arg4 - 0xa0c);
    
    /* jump -> 0xfe5703b4 */
}

void sub_1ae(int32_t arg1)
{
    /* unimplemented  {vsli.32 d27, d0, #0x1f} */
    
    if (!*0x20000080)
        *0x20000080 = 1;
}

void sub_1d4() __pure
{
    return;
}

int32_t sub_1f0(int32_t arg1, int32_t arg2, int32_t arg3, int32_t arg4)
{
    /* tailcall */
    return sub_1fc(arg1, arg2 ^ 0x80000000, arg3, arg4);
}

void sub_1fc(int32_t arg1, int32_t arg2, int32_t arg3, int32_t arg4)
{
    int32_t r4 = arg2 << 1;
    int32_t r5 = arg4 << 1;
    int32_t temp0 = r4 ^ r5;
    bool cond:1 = !temp0;
    
    if (!temp0)
        cond:1 = arg1 == arg3;
    
    if (cond:1)
        return;
    
    uint32_t r4_1 = r4 >> 0x15;
    uint32_t temp2_1 = r5 >> 0x15;
    uint32_t r5_1 = (r5 >> 0x15) - r4_1;
    
    if (temp2_1 < r4_1)
        r5_1 = 0 - r5_1;
    
    if (temp2_1 > r4_1)
    {
        r4_1 += r5_1;
        int32_t r2 = arg1 ^ arg3;
        int32_t r3 = arg2 ^ arg4;
        arg1 ^= r2;
        arg2 ^= r3;
        arg3 = arg1 ^ r2;
        arg4 = arg2 ^ r3;
    }
    
    if (r5_1 > 0x36)
        return;
    
    int32_t r1_1 = 0x100000 | (arg2 & 0xfffff);
    
    if (arg2 & 0x80000000)
    {
        int32_t temp4_1 = arg1;
        arg1 = 0 - arg1;
        r1_1 = r1_1 - (r1_1 << 1);
    }
    
    int32_t r3_2 = 0x100000 | (arg4 & 0xfffff);
    
    if (arg4 & 0x80000000)
    {
        int32_t temp5_1 = arg3;
        arg3 = 0 - arg3;
        r3_2 = r3_2 - (r3_2 << 1);
    }
    
    if (r4_1 == r5_1)
    {
        r3_2 ^= 0x100000;
        
        if (!r4_1)
            r1_1 ^= 0x100000;
        else
            r5_1 -= 1;
    }
    
    uint32_t r0_1;
    uint32_t r1_3;
    int32_t r12_2;
    bool cond:10_1;
    
    if (0x20 < r5_1)
    {
        r12_2 = r3_2 << (0x20 * 2 - r5_1);
        
        if (arg3 >= 1)
            r12_2 |= 2;
        
        int32_t r3_4 = r3_2 >> (r5_1 - 0x20);
        r0_1 = arg1 + r3_4;
        r1_3 = r1_1 + (r3_4 >> 0x1f);
        cond:10_1 = r1_3 >= 0;
    }
    else
    {
        r12_2 = arg3 << (0x20 - r5_1);
        uint32_t r2_1 = arg3 >> r5_1;
        int32_t r0 = arg1 + r2_1;
        int32_t r2_2 = r3_2 << (0x20 - r5_1);
        r0_1 = r0 + r2_2;
        r1_3 = r1_1 + 0 + (r3_2 >> r5_1);
        cond:10_1 = r1_3 >= 0;
    }
    
    if (!cond:10_1)
    {
        int32_t temp13_1 = r12_2;
        r12_2 = 0 - r12_2;
        bool c_6 = 0 >= temp13_1;
        uint32_t temp14_1 = r0_1;
        bool cond:16_1 = ~c_6;
        r0_1 = 0 - temp14_1;
        r1_3 = 0 - r1_3;
    }
    
    if (r1_3 >= 0x100000)
        return;
    
    bool c_11 = TEST_BIT(r12_2, 0x1f);
    r1_3 = r1_3 + r1_3;
    
    if (r1_3 & 0x100000)
        return;
    
    if (!r1_3)
        r1_3 = r0_1 + r0_1;
    
    __clz(r1_3);
}

int32_t sub_4b8(int32_t arg1, int32_t arg2, int32_t arg3, int32_t arg4, int32_t arg5 @ r12)
{
    int32_t r2_1 = arg1 << 1;
    int32_t result = r2_1 << 0x1c;
    
    if (r2_1)
        return result;
    
    if (!(r2_1 & 0xffffff))
        return result;
    
    if (arg4 == 0xff000000)
        return result;
    
    int32_t result_1 = r2_1 >> 3 & 0x7fffffff;
    bool cond:1 = !result_1;
    
    if (!result_1)
    {
        result_1 = result;
        result = 0;
    }
    
    int32_t r3 = __clz(result_1);
    
    if (cond:1)
        r3 += 0x20;
    
    int32_t r2_2 = r3 - 0x2b;
    bool cond:2 = r3 - 0xb <= 0x20;
    bool cond:3 = r3 - 0xb <= 0x20;
    
    if (r3 - 0xb >= 0x20)
        goto label_36a;
    
    cond:2 = r2_2 <= 0xfffffff4;
    cond:3 = r2_2 <= 0xfffffff4;
    uint32_t r1_4;
    
    if (r2_2 <= 0xfffffff4)
    {
        r2_2 += 0x20;
    label_36a:
        
        if (cond:2)
            arg5 = 0x20 - r2_2;
        
        r1_4 = result_1 << r2_2;
        
        if (cond:3)
        {
            r1_4 |= result >> arg5;
            result <<= r2_2;
        }
    }
    else
    {
        result = result_1 << (r2_2 + 0x20);
        r1_4 = result_1 >> (0xc * 0 - r2_2);
    }
    
    if (0x380 >= r3 - 0xb)
        return result;
    
    int32_t r4_1;
    
    if (~(0x380 - (r3 - 0xb)) >= 0x1f)
        return r1_4 >> (r4_1 - 0x1f);
    
    if (r4_1 - 0x1f > 0xfffffff4)
        return result >> (0x20 - (0xc * 0 - (r4_1 - 0x1f))) | r1_4 << (0xc * 0 - (r4_1 - 0x1f));
    
    return result >> (r4_1 + 1) | r1_4 << (0x20 * 0 - (r4_1 - 0x1f));
}

void sub_4fc(int32_t arg1, uint32_t arg2)
{
    if (!(arg1 | arg2))
        return;
    
    uint32_t r12 = arg2 >> 0x16;
    
    if (r12)
    {
        int32_t r2 = 3;
        uint32_t r12_1 = r12 >> 3;
        
        if (r12_1)
            r2 = 6;
        
        uint32_t r12_2 = r12_1 >> 3;
        
        if (r12_2)
            r2 += 3;
        
        int32_t r2_1 = r2 + (r12_2 >> 3);
        r12 = arg1 << (0x20 - r2_1);
        arg1 = arg1 >> r2_1 | arg2 << (0x20 - r2_1);
        arg2 u>>= r2_1;
    }
    
    if (arg2 >= 0x100000)
        return;
    
    bool c_4 = TEST_BIT(r12, 0x1f);
    arg2 = arg2 + arg2;
    
    if (arg2 & 0x100000)
        return;
    
    if (!arg2)
        arg2 = arg1 + arg1;
    
    __clz(arg2);
}

int32_t sub_568(int32_t arg1, int32_t arg2, int32_t arg3, int32_t arg4, int32_t arg5 @ r5)
{
    int32_t var_c = arg5;
    int32_t r12 = 0x7ff;
    int32_t r4 = 0x7ff & arg2 >> 0x14;
    
    if (r4)
        arg5 = 0x7ff & arg4 >> 0x14;
    else
        arg1 = sub_744(arg1, arg2, arg3, arg4);
    
    int32_t r4_1 = r4 + arg5;
    int32_t r6 = arg2 ^ arg4;
    int32_t r1 = arg2 & ~(r12 << 0x15);
    int32_t r1_1 = r1 | 0x100000;
    int32_t r3_1 = (arg4 & ~(r12 << 0x15)) | 0x100000;
    int32_t r0_1;
    int32_t r1_3;
    int32_t r4_3;
    int32_t lr_3;
    bool cond:2;
    
    if (!(arg1 | r1 << 0xc))
    {
        r0_1 = arg1 | arg3;
        int32_t r4_4 = r4_1 - (r12 >> 1);
        
        if (r4_1 > r12 >> 1)
            return r0_1;
        
        r1_3 = (((r6 & 0x80000000) | r1_1) ^ r3_1) | 0x100000;
        lr_3 = 0;
        r4_3 = r4_4 - 1;
        cond:2 = r4_4 > 1;
    }
    else
    {
        int32_t r5_5;
        int32_t r6_2;
        r6_2 = HIGHD(r3_1 * r1_1 + r3_1 * arg1 + arg3 * r1_1 + arg1 * arg3);
        r5_5 = LOWD(r3_1 * r1_1 + r3_1 * arg1 + arg3 * r1_1 + arg1 * arg3);
        int32_t r12_1;
        int32_t lr_2;
        
        if (r12_1)
            lr_2 |= 1;
        
        bool c_1 = r6_2 >= 0x200;
        r4_3 = r4_1 - 0xff - 0x300;
        
        if (!c_1)
        {
            int32_t temp3_1 = lr_2;
            lr_2 <<= 1;
            bool c_2 = TEST_BIT(temp3_1, 0x1f);
            int32_t temp4_1 = r5_5;
            int32_t temp5_1 = r5_5;
            r5_5 = temp4_1 + temp5_1;
            r6_2 = r6_2 + r6_2;
        }
        
        r1_3 = (r6 & 0x80000000) | r6_2 << 0xb | r5_5 >> 0x15;
        r0_1 = r5_5 << 0xb | lr_2 >> 0x15;
        lr_3 = lr_2 << 0xb;
        bool cond:1_1 = r4_3 > 0xfd;
        cond:2 = r4_3 > 0xfd;
        
        if (r4_3 > 0xfd)
        {
            cond:1_1 = r4_3 - 0xfd > 0x700;
            cond:2 = r4_3 - 0xfd > 0x700;
        }
        
        if (!cond:1_1)
            return r0_1 + 0;
    }
    
    if (cond:2)
        return 0;
    
    if (r4_3 <= 0xffffffca)
        return 0;
    
    if (0 - r4_3 >= 0x20)
    {
        int32_t r3_5 = r0_1 >> (0 - r4_3 - 0x20) | r1_3 << (0x20 * 2 - (0 - r4_3));
        int32_t r0_12 = (r1_3 >> (0 - r4_3 - 0x20) & ~((r1_3 & 0x80000000) >> (0 - r4_3 - 0x20)))
            + (r3_5 >> 0x1f);
        
        if (!(lr_3 | r0_1 << (0x20 * 2 - (0 - r4_3)) | r3_5 << 1))
            return r0_12 & ~(r3_5 >> 0x1f);
        
        return r0_12;
    }
    
    if (0 - r4_3 - 0x20 > 0xfffffff4)
    {
        int32_t r3_3 = r0_1 << (0xc * 0 - (0 - r4_3 - 0x20));
        int32_t r0_9 = (r0_1 >> (0x20 - (0xc * 0 - (0 - r4_3 - 0x20)))
            | r1_3 << (0xc * 0 - (0 - r4_3 - 0x20))) + (r3_3 >> 0x1f);
        
        if (!(lr_3 | r3_3 << 1))
            return r0_9 & ~(r3_3 >> 0x1f);
        
        return r0_9;
    }
    
    int32_t r3_2 = r0_1 << (0x20 * 0 - (0 - r4_3 - 0x20));
    int32_t r0_6 = (r0_1 >> (0 - r4_3) | r1_3 << (0x20 * 0 - (0 - r4_3 - 0x20))) + (r3_2 >> 0x1f);
    
    if (!(lr_3 | r3_2 << 1))
        return r0_6 & ~(r3_2 >> 0x1f);
    
    return r0_6;
}

void sub_7bc(int32_t arg1, int32_t arg2, int32_t arg3, int32_t arg4, int32_t arg5 @ r4, int32_t arg6 @ r5, int32_t arg7 @ r6)
{
    int32_t r4 = 0x7ff & arg2 >> 0x14;
    int32_t r12;
    
    if (!r4)
        arg1 = sub_92a(arg1, arg2, arg3, arg4, r4, 0x7ff, arg5, arg6, arg7);
    
    if (!(arg3 | arg4 << 0xc))
        return;
    
    uint32_t r3_2 = 0x10000000 | arg4 << 0xc >> 4 | arg3 >> 0x18;
    int32_t r2 = arg3 << 8;
    int32_t r5_2 = 0x10000000 | arg2 << 0xc >> 4 | arg1 >> 0x18;
    int32_t r6 = arg1 << 8;
    int32_t r1_1 = (arg2 ^ arg4) & 0x80000000;
    bool c_1 = r5_2 >= r3_2;
    
    if (r5_2 == r3_2)
        c_1 = r6 >= r2;
    
    if (!c_1)
        r3_2 u>>= 1;
    
    int32_t r6_1 = r6 - r2;
    int32_t r5_3 = r5_2 - r3_2;
    uint32_t r3_3 = r3_2 >> 1;
    int32_t r2_1 = r2;
    arg1 = 0x100000;
    uint32_t r12_1 = 0x80000;
    
    while (true)
    {
        bool c_3 = r6_1 >= r2_1;
        bool cond:3_1 = ~c_3;
        
        if (r5_3 - r3_3 < r5_3 || (r5_3 - r3_3 == r5_3 && c_3))
        {
            r6_1 -= r2_1;
            r5_3 = r5_3 - r3_3;
            arg1 |= r12_1;
        }
        
        uint32_t r3_4 = r3_3 >> 1;
        bool c_5 = r6_1 >= r2_1;
        bool cond:4_1 = ~c_5;
        
        if (r5_3 - r3_4 < r5_3 || (r5_3 - r3_4 == r5_3 && c_5))
        {
            r6_1 -= r2_1;
            r5_3 = r5_3 - r3_4;
            arg1 |= r12_1 >> 1;
        }
        
        uint32_t r3_5 = r3_4 >> 1;
        bool c_7 = r6_1 >= r2_1;
        bool cond:5_1 = ~c_7;
        
        if (r5_3 - r3_5 < r5_3 || (r5_3 - r3_5 == r5_3 && c_7))
        {
            r6_1 -= r2_1;
            r5_3 = r5_3 - r3_5;
            arg1 |= r12_1 >> 2;
        }
        
        r3_3 = r3_5 >> 1;
        bool c_9 = r6_1 >= r2_1;
        bool cond:6_1 = ~c_9;
        
        if (r5_3 - r3_3 < r5_3 || (r5_3 - r3_3 == r5_3 && c_9))
        {
            r6_1 -= r2_1;
            r5_3 = r5_3 - r3_3;
            arg1 |= r12_1 >> 3;
        }
        
        if (!(r5_3 | r6_1))
            break;
        
        r5_3 = r5_3 << 4 | r6_1 >> 0x1c;
        r6_1 <<= 4;
        r3_3 = r3_3 << 3 | r2_1 >> 0x1d;
        r2_1 <<= 3;
        r12_1 u>>= 4;
        
        if (!r12_1)
        {
            if (r1_1 & 0x100000)
                break;
            
            r1_1 |= arg1;
            arg1 = 0;
            r12_1 = 0x80000000;
        }
    }
}

void sub_92a(int32_t arg1, int32_t arg2, int32_t arg3, int32_t arg4, int32_t arg5 @ r4, int32_t arg6 @ r12, int32_t arg7, int32_t arg8, int32_t arg9) __pure
{
    int32_t r5_2 = arg6 & arg4 >> 0x14;
    int32_t temp0 = arg5 ^ arg6;
    bool cond:0 = !temp0;
    
    if (!temp0)
        cond:0 = r5_2 == arg6;
    
    if (cond:0 || arg5 == arg6 || r5_2 == arg6 || !(arg1 | arg2 << 1))
        return;
    
    if (!arg5)
    {
        int32_t i;
        
        do
        {
            int32_t temp3_1 = arg1;
            arg1 <<= 1;
            arg2 = arg2 + arg2;
            i = arg2 & 0x100000;
            
            if (!i)
                arg5 -= 1;
        } while (!i);
        
        if (r5_2)
            return;
    }
    
    int32_t i_1;
    
    do
    {
        int32_t temp1_1 = arg3;
        arg3 <<= 1;
        arg4 = arg4 + arg4;
        i_1 = arg4 & 0x100000;
        
        if (!i_1)
            r5_2 -= 1;
    } while (!i_1);
}

int32_t sub_99c(int32_t arg1, int32_t arg2, int32_t arg3, int32_t arg4) __pure
{
    if (!~(arg2 << 1 >> 0x15))
    {
        if (!~(arg2 << 1 >> 0x15) && arg1 | arg2 << 0xc)
            return 1;
        
        if (!~(arg4 << 1 >> 0x15) && arg3 | arg4 << 0xc)
            return 1;
    }
    
    int32_t r12_4 = arg1 | arg2 << 1;
    bool cond:2 = !r12_4;
    
    if (r12_4)
        cond:2 = arg2 == arg4;
    
    if (cond:2)
        return 0;
    
    int32_t temp0 = arg2 ^ arg4;
    bool cond:3 = !temp0;
    bool cond:4 = temp0 >= 0;
    
    if (temp0 >= 0)
    {
        cond:3 = arg2 == arg4;
        cond:4 = arg2 >= arg4;
    }
    
    if (cond:3)
        cond:4 = arg1 >= arg3;
    
    int32_t r0_1;
    
    r0_1 = cond:4 ? arg4 >> 0x1f : ~(arg4 >> 0x1f);
    
    return r0_1 | 1;
}

int32_t sub_a18(int32_t arg1, int32_t arg2, int32_t arg3, int32_t arg4)
{
    /* tailcall */
    return sub_a28(arg3, arg4, arg1, arg2);
}

int32_t sub_a28(int32_t arg1, int32_t arg2, int32_t arg3, int32_t arg4)
{
    sub_99c(arg1, arg2, arg3, arg4);
    return arg1;
}

int32_t sub_a38(int32_t arg1, int32_t arg2, int32_t arg3, int32_t arg4)
{
    sub_a28(arg1, arg2, arg3, arg4);
    bool z;
    
    if (z)
        return 1;
    
    return 0;
}

int32_t sub_a4c(int32_t arg1, int32_t arg2, int32_t arg3, int32_t arg4)
{
    sub_a28(arg1, arg2, arg3, arg4);
    bool c;
    
    if (!c)
        return 1;
    
    return 0;
}

{
    sub_a28(arg1, arg2, arg3, arg4);
    bool z;
    bool c;
    
    if (z || !c)

}

    sub_a18(arg1, arg2, arg3, arg4);

    sub_a18(arg1, arg2, arg3, arg4);
    bool c;
    
    if (!c)

}

uint32_t sub_a9c(int32_t arg1, int32_t arg2) __pure
{
    int32_t r2_2 = arg2 << 1;
    
    if (r2_2 < 0xffe00000)
    {
        if (r2_2 + 0x200000 >= 0)
            return 0;
        
        if (0xfffffc1f > (r2_2 + 0x200000) >> 0x15)
        {
            uint32_t r0 = (arg2 << 0xb | 0x80000000 | arg1 >> 0x15)
                >> (0xfffffc1f - ((r2_2 + 0x200000) >> 0x15));
            
            if (arg2 & 0x80000000)
                return 0 - r0;
            
            return r0;
        }
    }
    else if (arg1 | arg2 << 0xc)
        return 0;
    
    int32_t r0_3 = arg2 & 0x80000000;
    
    if (!r0_3)
        return 0x7fffffff;
    
    return r0_3;
}

uint32_t sub_aec(int32_t arg1, int32_t arg2) __pure
{
    int32_t r2_2 = arg2 << 1;
    
    if (!TEST_BIT(arg2, 0x1f))
    {
        if (r2_2 >= 0xffe00000)
        {
            if (arg1 | arg2 << 0xc)
                return 0;
            
            return 0xffffffff;
        }
        
        if (r2_2 + 0x200000 < 0)
        {
            if (0xfffffc1f - ((r2_2 + 0x200000) >> 0x15) >= 0)
                return (arg2 << 0xb | 0x80000000 | arg1 >> 0x15)
                    >> (0xfffffc1f - ((r2_2 + 0x200000) >> 0x15));
            
            return 0xffffffff;
        }
    }
    
    return 0;
}

int32_t sub_b2c(uint32_t arg1, int32_t arg2) __pure
{
    int32_t r2_4 = arg2 << 1;
    uint32_t r3 = r2_4 - 0x70000000;
    
    if (r2_4 <= 0x70000000)
    {
        if (arg2 & 0x40000000)
        {
            if (!~(r2_4 >> 0x15) && arg1 | arg2 << 0xc)
                return 0x7fc00000;
            
            return (arg2 & 0x80000000) | 0x7f000000 | 0x800000;
        }
        
        if (r3 < 0xfd200000)
            return arg2 & 0x80000000;
        
        arg2 |= 0x100000;
        uint32_t r0_2 = arg1 >> (0x18 - ((r3 + 0x2e00000) >> 0x15));
        
        if (arg1 << (0x20 - (0x18 - ((r3 + 0x2e00000) >> 0x15))))
            r0_2 |= 1;
        
        uint32_t r3_3 = arg2 & 0x1fffff;
        arg1 = r0_2 | r3_3 << (0x20 - (0x18 - ((r3 + 0x2e00000) >> 0x15)));
        r3 = r3_3 >> (0x18 - ((r3 + 0x2e00000) >> 0x15)) << 1;
    }
    
    int32_t r2 = arg1 << 3;
    int32_t result = ((arg2 & 0x80000000) | arg1 >> 0x1d) + (r3 << 2);
    
    if (r2 == 0x80000000)
        return result & 0xfffffffe;
    
    return result;
}

uint32_t sub_bcc(int32_t arg1, int32_t arg2, int32_t arg3, int32_t arg4)
{
    if (arg4 || arg3)
    {
        int32_t var_8;
        return sub_bfc(arg1, arg2, arg3, arg4, &var_8);
    }
    
    /* tailcall */
    return sub_ec8();
}

uint32_t sub_bfc(int32_t arg1, int32_t arg2, int32_t arg3, int32_t arg4, int32_t* arg5)
{
    int32_t r4 = arg1;
    int32_t r8 = arg2;
    uint32_t r0_2;
    
    if (arg4)
    {
        if (arg4 > arg2)
        {
            if (!arg5)
                return arg5;
            
            *arg5 = arg1;
            arg5[1] = arg2;
            return 0;
        }
        
        uint32_t r7_4 = __clz(arg4);
        
        if (r7_4)
        {
            int32_t lr_4 = arg3 >> (0x20 - r7_4) | arg4 << r7_4;
            uint32_t r3_12 = arg2 >> (0x20 - r7_4);
            uint32_t r8_4 = lr_4 >> 0x10;
            int32_t r5_3 = arg1 >> (0x20 - r7_4) | arg2 << r7_4;
            uint32_t r9_1 = r3_12 / r8_4;
            uint32_t r10_1 = lr_4;
            int32_t r3_14 = r5_3 >> 0x10 | (r3_12 % r8_4) << 0x10;
            int32_t r4_9 = r9_1 * r10_1;
            int32_t r2_1 = arg3 << r7_4;
            int32_t r1_7 = arg1 << r7_4;
            
            if (r4_9 > r3_14)
            {
                int32_t temp0_1 = r3_14;
                r3_14 += lr_4;
                
                if (lr_4 + temp0_1 < lr_4 || r4_9 <= r3_14)
                    r9_1 -= 1;
                else
                {
                    r9_1 -= 2;
                    r3_14 += lr_4;
                }
            }
            
            int32_t r3_15 = r3_14 - r4_9;
            uint32_t r0_7 = r3_15 / r8_4;
            int32_t r4_10 = r5_3 | (r3_15 % r8_4) << 0x10;
            int32_t r10_2 = r0_7 * r10_1;
            
            if (r10_2 > r4_10)
            {
                int32_t temp2_1 = r4_10;
                r4_10 += lr_4;
                
                if (lr_4 + temp2_1 < lr_4 || r10_2 <= r4_10)
                    r0_7 -= 1;
                else
                {
                    r0_7 -= 2;
                    r4_10 += lr_4;
                }
            }
            
            r0_2 = r0_7 | r9_1 << 0x10;
            int32_t r8_5;
            int32_t r9_2;
            r9_2 = HIGHD(r0_2 * r2_1);
            r8_5 = LOWD(r0_2 * r2_1);
            int32_t r4_11 = r4_10 - r10_2;
            int32_t r10_3 = r8_5;
            int32_t r3_18 = r9_2;
            
            if (r4_11 < r9_2)
            {
            label_e94:
                r10_3 = r8_5 - r2_1;
                r0_2 -= 1;
                r3_18 = r9_2 - lr_4;
            }
            else if (r4_11 == r9_2 && r1_7 < r8_5)
                goto label_e94;
            
            if (arg5)
            {
                int32_t r4_12 = r4_11 - r3_18;
                *arg5 = r4_12 << (0x20 - r7_4) | (r1_7 - r10_3) >> r7_4;
                arg5[1] = r4_12 >> r7_4;
            }
        }
        else
        {
            if (arg4 < arg2 || arg3 <= arg1)
            {
                r4 = arg1 - arg3;
                r0_2 = 1;
                r8 = arg2 - arg4;
            }
            else
                r0_2 = r7_4;
            
            if (arg5)
            {
                *arg5 = r4;
                arg5[1] = r8;
            }
        }
    }
    else
    {
        int32_t r5_1 = arg3;
        int32_t r2;
        int32_t r4_3;
        
        if (arg3 <= arg2)
        {
            if (!arg3)
                trap(0xff);
            
            r2 = __clz(arg3);
            int32_t r1_3;
            uint32_t r8_2;
            uint32_t lr_2;
            
            if (r2)
            {
                r5_1 <<= r2;
                uint32_t r3_20 = arg2 >> (0x20 - r2);
                lr_2 = r5_1 >> 0x10;
                int32_t r0_9 = arg2 << r2 | arg1 >> (0x20 - r2);
                r8_2 = r5_1;
                int32_t r1_9 = r0_9 >> 0x10 | (r3_20 % lr_2) << 0x10;
                int32_t r3_22 = r3_20 / lr_2 * r8_2;
                r4 <<= r2;
                
                if (r3_22 > r1_9)
                {
                    int32_t temp3_1 = r1_9;
                    r1_9 += r5_1;
                    
                    if (r5_1 + temp3_1 >= r5_1 && r3_22 > r1_9)
                        r1_9 += r5_1;
                }
                
                int32_t r3_23 = r1_9 - r3_22;
                int32_t r1_11 = r0_9 | (r3_23 % lr_2) << 0x10;
                int32_t r3_25 = r3_23 / lr_2 * r8_2;
                
                if (r3_25 > r1_11)
                {
                    int32_t temp5_1 = r1_11;
                    r1_11 += r5_1;
                    
                    if (r5_1 + temp5_1 >= r5_1 && r3_25 > r1_11)
                        r1_11 += r5_1;
                }
                
                r1_3 = r1_11 - r3_25;
            }
            else
            {
                r1_3 = arg2 - r5_1;
                lr_2 = r5_1 >> 0x10;
                r8_2 = r5_1;
            }
            
            uint32_t r12_3 = r1_3 / lr_2;
            int32_t r3_8 = r4 >> 0x10 | (r1_3 % lr_2) << 0x10;
            int32_t r1_5 = r8_2 * r12_3;
            
            if (r1_5 > r3_8)
            {
                int32_t temp6_1 = r3_8;
                r3_8 += r5_1;
                
                if (r5_1 + temp6_1 < r5_1 || r1_5 <= r3_8)
                    r12_3 -= 1;
                else
                {
                    r12_3 -= 2;
                    r3_8 += r5_1;
                }
            }
            
            int32_t r1_6 = r3_8 - r1_5;
            uint32_t r0_5 = r1_6 / lr_2;
            int32_t r4_6 = r4 | (r1_6 % lr_2) << 0x10;
            int32_t r8_3 = r8_2 * r0_5;
            
            if (r8_3 > r4_6)
            {
                int32_t temp7_1 = r4_6;
                r4_6 += r5_1;
                
                if (r5_1 + temp7_1 < r5_1 || r8_3 <= r4_6)
                    r0_5 -= 1;
                else
                {
                    r0_5 -= 2;
                    r4_6 += r5_1;
                }
            }
            
            r4_3 = r4_6 - r8_3;
            r0_2 = r0_5 | r12_3 << 0x10;
        }
        else
        {
            r2 = __clz(arg3);
            
            if (r2)
            {
                r5_1 <<= r2;
                r8 = arg1 >> (0x20 - r2) | arg2 << r2;
                r4 <<= r2;
            }
            
            uint32_t lr_1 = r5_1 >> 0x10;
            uint32_t r7_3 = r8 / lr_1;
            uint32_t r12_1 = r5_1;
            int32_t r3_2 = r4 >> 0x10 | (r8 % lr_1) << 0x10;
            int32_t r1 = r7_3 * r12_1;
            
            if (r1 > r3_2)
            {
                int32_t temp1_1 = r3_2;
                r3_2 += r5_1;
                
                if (r5_1 + temp1_1 < r5_1 || r1 <= r3_2)
                    r7_3 -= 1;
                else
                {
                    r7_3 -= 2;
                    r3_2 += r5_1;
                }
            }
            
            int32_t r3_3 = r3_2 - r1;
            uint32_t r0_1 = r3_3 / lr_1;
            int32_t r4_2 = r4 | (r3_3 % lr_1) << 0x10;
            int32_t r12_2 = r0_1 * r12_1;
            
            if (r12_2 > r4_2)
            {
                int32_t temp4_1 = r4_2;
                r4_2 += r5_1;
                
                if (r5_1 + temp4_1 < r5_1 || r12_2 <= r4_2)
                    r0_1 -= 1;
                else
                {
                    r0_1 -= 2;
                    r4_2 += r5_1;
                }
            }
            
            r0_2 = r0_1 | r7_3 << 0x10;
            r4_3 = r4_2 - r12_2;
        }
        
        if (arg5)
        {
            *arg5 = r4_3 >> r2;
            arg5[1] = 0;
        }
    }
    
    return r0_2;
}

int32_t sub_ec8() __pure
{
    return;
}

int32_t sub_ecc()
{
    int16_t* r7 = 0x2000035c;
    int16_t var_1c = 0;
    uint32_t i = 0;
    char var_1e = 0;
    char var_1a = 0;
    char var_20 = 1;
    
    do
    {
        sub_4f9c(0x40020400, 0x1000, 0);
        char var_1f_1 = i | 0xa0;
        var_1c = 0;
        char var_1a_1 = 0;
        sub_6024(0x20001368, &var_20, &var_1c, 3, 0x64);
        sub_4f9c(0x40020400, 0x1000, 1);
        uint32_t r3_1 = *(&var_1c + 1);
        i = i + 0x40;
        *r7 = (RORW(r3_1 >> 0x10, 0x10) << 0x10 | RORW(r3_1, 0x10)) & 0xfff;
        r7 = &r7[1];
    } while (i != 0x80);
    
    return 0xa;
}

uint32_t sub_f58(int32_t arg1)
{
    return *(0x2000035c + (arg1 << 1));
}

int32_t sub_f64()
{
    *0x20000362 = sub_4f90(0x40020400, 0x400);
    *0x20000361 = sub_4f90(0x40020400, 0x800);
    int32_t r0_2 = sub_4f90(0x40020c00, 0x1000);
    char result = sub_4f90(0x40020c00, 0x800) | r0_2 << 1;
    *0x20000360 = result;
    return result;
}

{

}

    return *0x20000361;
}

{
    return *0x20000360;
}

void sub_fe0(int32_t arg1)
{
    if (arg1 > 4)
        return;
    
    switch (arg1)
    {
        case 0:
        {
            /* tailcall */
            return sub_4f9c(0x40020000, 1, 0);
        }
        case 1:
        {
            /* tailcall */
            return sub_4f9c(0x40020000, 2, 0);
        }
        case 2:
        {
            /* tailcall */
            return sub_4f9c(0x40020000, 0x80, 0);
        }
        case 3:
        {
            /* tailcall */
            return sub_4f9c(0x40020000, 0x100, 0);
        }
        case 4:
        {
            /* tailcall */
            return sub_4f9c(0x40020000, 0x800, 0);
        }
    }
}

void sub_102c(int32_t arg1)
{
    if (arg1 > 4)
        return;
    
    switch (arg1)
    {
        case 0:
        {
            /* tailcall */
            return sub_4f9c(0x40020000, 1, 1);
        }
        case 1:
        {
            /* tailcall */
            return sub_4f9c(0x40020000, 2, 1);
        }
        case 2:
        {
            /* tailcall */
            return sub_4f9c(0x40020000, 0x80, 1);
        }
        case 3:
        {
            /* tailcall */
            return sub_4f9c(0x40020000, 0x100, 1);
        }
        case 4:
        {
            /* tailcall */
            return sub_4f9c(0x40020000, 0x800, 1);
        }
    }
}

}

{

                    sub_102c(1);
                    sub_fe0(2);

                    {
                        r3_55 = *0x200000cc;
                        *0x200000c8 = r3_55;
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        int32_t r2_21 = *0x200000cc;
                        int32_t r3_54 = *0x200013c0;
                        int32_t r2_22;
                        
                        if (r2_21 >= r3_54)
                            r2_22 = *0x20000000 + r3_54 - r2_21;
                        else
                            r2_22 = r3_54 - r2_21;
                        
                        int32_t r2_23 = r2_22 / (r1_12 << 1);
                        r3_55 = r3_54 - r2_23;
                        
                        if (r3_54 - r2_23 < 0)
                            r3_55 += *0x20000000;
                        
                        *0x200000c8 = r3_55;
                    }
                    
                    *0x200000c4 = r3_55;
                    result = sub_4310(0xa);
                    
                    if (result)
                    {
                        if (sub_4310(9))
                            result = 1;
                        else
                            result = 2;
                    }

                    *0x2000208a = result;
                    *0x200014d0 = result;
                    *0x200000dc = 0x41200000;
                    *0x200000d0 = 2;
                }
                else

            }
        }
    }
    
    return result;
}

uint32_t sub_15dc()
{
    int32_t r3 = *0x20001f5c;

    *0x200000b8 = *0x20001f58;
    
    if (*0x200000b8 << 8 < 0)

    int32_t r11 = *0x20001704;

    int32_t r0_15 = sub_b2c(r0_14, r1_6);
    uint32_t r3_8 = *0x200000b4 + 1;
    
    if (r3_8 == 4)
    {
        *0x200000b4 = 0;
        
        for (int32_t i = 0; i != 8; i += 1)
        {
            uint32_t r0_28 = sub_fbc();
            int32_t r0_29;
            
            if (!r0_28)
                r0_29 = sub_4310(3);

                int32_t r2_16 = *(0x20001f98 + (i << 2));
                
                if (r3_40 < r2_16)
                    *(0x2000000c + (i << 2)) = r3_40 + 1;
                else if (r3_40 > r2_16)
                    *(0x2000000c + (i << 2)) = r3_40 - 1;

                int32_t r1_17 = *(0x20001f98 + (i << 2));
                int32_t r3_42 = r2_17 - r1_17;

                    r3_42 = 0 - r3_42;
                
                int32_t r0_30 = i << 2;
                
                if (r3_42 > 4)
                {
                    if (r2_17 < r1_17)
                        *(0x2000000c + r0_30) = r2_17 + 5;
                    else if (r2_17 > r1_17)
                        *(0x2000000c + r0_30) = r2_17 - 5;
                }
            }
        }
    }
    else

    int32_t* r4_1 = 0x20000008;
    int32_t* r5_1 = 0x200016b8;
    uint32_t result;
    
    while (true)
    {
        r4_1 = &r4_1[1];
        int32_t r1_7 = *r4_1;
        *(&q3 + 0xc) = *0x20002088 + r1_7;
        *(&q3 + 8) = r1_7;
        *(&q3 + 4) = r0_15;

}

}

void sub_3214(int32_t* arg1)
{
    if (*arg1 == 0x40000000)
        /* tailcall */
        return sub_3d38();
}

int32_t sub_3224() __pure
{
    return;
}

uint32_t sub_3228(int32_t arg1)
{
    int32_t* r1_1 = *0x20000048 + 8;
    
    if (!arg1)
        arg1 = 1;
    
    if (r1_1 - 0x200000e0 <= 0xc0)
        *0x20000048 = r1_1;
    else
        *0x20000048 = 0x200000e0;
    
    int32_t* r5 = 0x20000030;
    
    if (r1_1 - 0x200000e0 > 0xc0)
        r1_1 = 0x200000e0;
    
    int32_t** r3 = *0x20000030;
    int32_t* r12 = *r1_1;
    r1_1[1] = arg1;
    
    if (r3 == r1_1)
    {
        *0x20000030 = r12;
        r3 = r12;
    }

                    result_2 = result_4;
                    result_4 = result;
                    uint32_t result_20 = result_7;
                    result_7 = result_13;
                    result_12 = result_3;
                    result_3 = result_6;
                    result_6 = result_20;
                    result = result_1;
                    result_1 = result_5;
                    result_5 = result_9;
                    result_13 = result_14;
                label_3854:
                    
                    if (r2_1 << 0x15 >= 0)
                        goto label_3884;
                    
                    *(0x200020cc + ((result_11 + (i << 3)) << 1)) = 0x6e;
                    
                    if (result_12 != 8)
                    {
                        result_11 = result_2;
                        result_2 = result_4;
                        result_4 = result;
                        uint32_t result_21 = result_7;
                        result_7 = result_13;
                        result_12 = result_3;
                        result_3 = result_6;
                        result_6 = result_21;
                        result = result_1;
                        result_1 = result_5;
                    label_3884:
                        
                        if (r2_1 << 0x14 >= 0)
                            goto label_38ac;
                        
                        *(0x200020cc + ((result_11 + (i << 3)) << 1)) = 0x78;
                        
                        if (result_12 != 8)
                        {
                            result_11 = result_2;
                            result_2 = result_4;
                            result_4 = result;
                            result_12 = result_3;
                            result_3 = result_6;
                            result_6 = result_7;
                            result = result_1;
                        label_38ac:

                                goto label_38cc;

                            {

                                result_3 = result_6;

                                result_4 = result;

                                    result_12 = result_3;
                                    result_2 = result_4;
                                label_38e8:

                                        goto label_3900;

                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        if (!*r10)
            *r10 = 0x14;
        
        if (!r10[1])
            r10[1] = 0x28;
        
        if (!r10[2])
            r10[2] = 0x3c;

            r10[3] = 0x50;

            r10[4] = 0x64;

            r10[5] = 0x78;

            r10[6] = 0x8c;
        
        if (!r10[7])
            r10[7] = 0xa0;
        
        i += 1;
        r10 = &r10[8];
    }
    
    return result;
}

int32_t sub_3c64(int32_t arg1)
{
    int32_t r5;

        r5 = 0xb;
    else

        return r5 * (arg1 + 1) * 0x14;
    
    if (!sub_4310(1))
        return r5 * *(0x200020cc + ((arg1 + 0x10) << 1));
    
    if (!sub_4310(2))
        return r5 * *(0x200020cc + (arg1 << 1));
    
    return r5 * *(0x200020cc + ((arg1 + 8) << 1));
}

int32_t sub_4458(int32_t* arg1)
{
    if (!arg1)
        return 1;
    
    int32_t r5 = arg1[0x10];

    {
        sub_3d90(arg1);
        arg1[0x11] = r5;
        arg1[0xf] = r5;
        
        if (arg1[0x10] << 0x1b < 0)
        {
            arg1[0xf] = 0;
            return 1;
        }
    }
    else if (arg1[0x10] << 0x1b < 0)
    {
        arg1[0xf] = 0;
        return 1;
    }
    
    void* r3_2 = *arg1;
    arg1[0x10] = (arg1[0x10] & 0xffffeefd) | 2;
    *0x40012304 &= 0xfffcffff;
    *0x40012304 |= arg1[1];

    int32_t r7 = arg1[2];
    int32_t r6 = arg1[3];

    *(r3_2 + 4) |= r1 << 8;
    *(r3_2 + 4) &= 0xfcffffff;

    *(r3_2 + 4) |= r7;
    *(r3_2 + 8) &= 0xfffff7ff;
    *(r3_2 + 8) |= r6;

    {
        *(r3_2 + 8) &= 0xf0ffffff;
        *(r3_2 + 8) &= 0xcfffffff;
    }
    else

        *(r3_2 + 8) &= 0xf0ffffff;
        *(r3_2 + 8) |= r0_6;
        *(r3_2 + 8) &= 0xcfffffff;
        *(r3_2 + 8) |= r5_1;
    }
    
    uint32_t r5_2 = arg1[6];
    uint32_t r0_8 = arg1[8];
    *(r3_2 + 8) &= 0xfffffffd;
    *(r3_2 + 8) |= r5_2 << 1;
    int32_t r2_17 = *(r3_2 + 4);
    
    if (r0_8)
    {
        int32_t r1_15 = arg1[9];
        *(r3_2 + 4) = r2_17 | 0x800;
        *(r3_2 + 4) &= 0xffff1fff;
        *(r3_2 + 4) |= (r1_15 - 1) << 0xd;
    }
    else

    int32_t r5_3 = arg1[7];
    uint32_t r7_1 = arg1[0xc];
    int32_t r6_1 = arg1[5];
    *(r3_2 + 0x2c) &= 0xff0fffff;
    *(r3_2 + 0x2c) |= (r5_3 - 1) << 0x14;

    arg1[0xf] = 0;
    return 0;
}

int32_t sub_45bc(int32_t* arg1)
{
    int32_t var_c = 0;
    
    if (arg1[0xf] == 1)
        return 2;
    
    int32_t* r2 = *arg1;
    arg1[0xf] = 1;
    
    if (r2[2] << 0x1f >= 0)
    {
        int32_t r3_3;
        int32_t r4_1;
        r3_3 = HIGHD(0x431bde83 * *0x20000074);
        r4_1 = LOWD(0x431bde83 * *0x20000074);
        r2[2] |= 1;
        
        for (uint32_t i = (r3_3 >> 0x12) * 3; i; i -= 1)
        {
        }
    }
    
    if (r2[2] << 0x1f < 0)
    {
        arg1[0x10] = (arg1[0x10] & 0xfffff8fe) | 0x100;
        
        if (r2[1] << 0x15 < 0)
            arg1[0x10] = (arg1[0x10] & 0xffffcfff) | 0x1000;
        
        int32_t r3_21 = arg1[0x10] & 0x1000;
        
        if (r3_21)
            r3_21 = arg1[0x11] & 0xfffffff9;
        
        arg1[0x11] = r3_21;
        arg1[0xf] = 0;
        *r2 = 0xffffffdd;
        
        if (!(*0x40012304 << 0x1b))
        {
            if (r2 == 0x40012000)
                goto label_4676;
            
            if (r2 == 0x40012100)
            {
                if (!(*0x40012304 << 0x1b))
                    goto label_4676;
            }
            else if (r2 == 0x40012200 && (*0x40012304 & 0x1f) <= 0xf)
                goto label_4676;
        }
        else if (r2 == 0x40012000)
        {
        label_4676:
            int32_t result = r2[2] & 0x30000000;
            
            if (!result)
            {
                r2[2] |= 0x40000000;
                return result;
            }
        }
    }
    
    return 0;
}

int32_t sub_46b8(int32_t* arg1)
{
    if (arg1[0xf] == 1)
        return 2;
    
    void* r3 = *arg1;
    arg1[0xf] = 1;
    *(r3 + 8) &= 0xfffffffe;
    
    if (*(r3 + 8) << 0x1f >= 0)
        arg1[0x10] = (arg1[0x10] & 0xffffeefe) | 1;
    
    arg1[0xf] = 0;
    return 0;
}

int32_t sub_46f4(int32_t* arg1, int32_t arg2)
{
    void* r3_19 = *arg1;
    
    if (*(r3_19 + 8) << 0x15 < 0 && *(r3_19 + 8) << 0x17 < 0)
    {
        arg1[0x10] |= 0x20;
        arg1[0xf] = 0;
        return 1;
    }
    
    int32_t r0 = sub_4428();
    int32_t* r2_3;
    
    while (true)
    {
        r2_3 = *arg1;
        
        if (arg2 == 0xffffffff)
        {
            while (*r2_3 << 0x1e >= 0)
                /* nop */
            
            break;
        }
        
        if (*r2_3 << 0x1e < 0)
            break;
        
        if (arg2 && sub_4428() - r0 <= arg2)
            continue;
        
        arg1[0x10] |= 4;
        arg1[0xf] = 0;
        return 3;
    }
    
    *r2_3 = 0xffffffed;
    arg1[0x10] |= 0x200;
    
    if (!(r2_3[2] & 0x30000000) && !arg1[6] && (!(r2_3[0xb] & 0xf00000) || r2_3[2] << 0x15 >= 0))
    {
        arg1[0x10] &= 0xfffffeff;
        int32_t result = arg1[0x10] & 0x1000;
        
        if (!result)
        {
            arg1[0x10] |= 1;
            return result;
        }
    }
    
    return 0;
}

int32_t sub_4798(int32_t* arg1)
{
    return *(*arg1 + 0x4c);
}

int32_t sub_47a0(int32_t* arg1, int32_t* arg2)
{
    int32_t var_14 = 0;
    
    if (arg1[0xf] == 1)
        return 2;
    
    int32_t r5 = *arg2;
    int32_t r2 = arg2[2];
    void* r3_1 = *arg1;
    uint32_t r7 = r5;
    arg1[0xf] = 1;
    int32_t r2_1;
    int32_t r6_3;
    
    if (r5 <= 9)
    {
        int32_t r6 = r5 * 3;
        *(r3_1 + 0x10) &= ~(7 << r6);
        *(r3_1 + 0x10) |= r2 << r6;
        r6_3 = arg2[1];
        r2_1 = r6_3 * 5;
        
        if (r6_3 > 6)
            goto label_4842;
        
        goto label_47f8;
    }
    
    *(r3_1 + 0xc) &= ~(7 << (r7 * 3 - 0x1e));
    *(r3_1 + 0xc) |= r2 << (r7 * 3 - 0x1e);
    r6_3 = arg2[1];
    r2_1 = r6_3 * 5;
    
    if (r6_3 <= 6)
    {
    label_47f8:
        *(r3_1 + 0x34) &= ~(0x1f << (r2_1 - 5));
        *(r3_1 + 0x34) |= r7 << (r2_1 - 5);
    label_4806:
        
        if (r3_1 == 0x40012000)
        {
        label_4866:
            
            if (r5 == 0x12)
            {
                *0x40012304 &= 0xff7fffff;
                *0x40012304 |= 0x400000;
            }
            else if (r5 == 0x10000012)
            {
                *0x40012304 &= 0xffbfffff;
                *0x40012304 |= 0x800000;
                int32_t r2_9;
                int32_t r3_3;
                r3_3 = HIGHD(0x431bde83 * *0x20000074);
                r2_9 = LOWD(0x431bde83 * *0x20000074);
                
                for (uint32_t i = (r3_3 >> 0x12) * 0xa; i; i -= 1)
                {
                }
            }
            else if (r5 == 0x11)
            {
                *0x40012304 &= 0xffbfffff;
                *0x40012304 |= 0x800000;
            }
        }
    }
    else
    {
    label_4842:
        
        if (r6_3 > 0xc)
        {
            *(r3_1 + 0x2c) &= ~(0x1f << (r2_1 - 0x41));
            *(r3_1 + 0x2c) |= r7 << (r2_1 - 0x41);
            goto label_4806;
        }
        
        *(r3_1 + 0x30) &= ~(0x1f << (r2_1 - 0x23));
        *(r3_1 + 0x30) |= r7 << (r2_1 - 0x23);
        
        if (r3_1 == 0x40012000)
            goto label_4866;
    }
    
    arg1[0xf] = 0;
    return 0;
}

int32_t sub_4910(int32_t arg1)
{
    int32_t result = arg1 << 8 & 0x700;
    *0xe000ed0c = (*0xe000ed0c & 0xf8ff) | 0x5f80000 | 0x20000 | result;
    return result;
}

void* sub_4934(void* arg1, int32_t arg2, int32_t arg3)
{
    int32_t r3_1 = *0xe000ed0c >> 8 & 7;
    int32_t r5 = 7 - r3_1;
    
    if (r5 >= 4)
        r5 = 4;
    
    int32_t r3_2;
    int32_t r4_2;
    
    if (r3_1 + 4 <= 6)
    {
        r4_2 = 0;
        r3_2 = 0;
    }
    else
    {
        r3_2 = r3_1 - 3;
        r4_2 = arg3 & ~(0xffffffff << r3_2);
    }
    
    char r2_3 = ((arg2 & ~(0xffffffff << r5)) << r3_2 | r4_2) << 4;
    
    if (arg1 >= 0)
    {
        *(arg1 - 0x1fff1c00) = r2_3;
        return arg1 - 0x1fff1f00;
    }
    
    void* result = arg1 & 0xf;
    *(result - 0x1fff12ec) = r2_3;
    return result;
}

void sub_49a0(uint32_t arg1)
{
    if (arg1 >= 0)
        *(0xe000e100 + (arg1 >> 5 << 2)) = 1 << (arg1 & 0x1f);
}

int32_t sub_49bc(int32_t arg1)
{
    if (arg1 - 1 >= 0x1000000)
        return 1;
    
    *0xe000e014 = arg1 - 1;
    *0xe000ed23 = 0xf0;
    *0xe000e018 = 0;
    *0xe000e010 = 7;
    return 0;
}

int32_t sub_49f0(int32_t* arg1)
{
    int32_t r0 = sub_4428();
    
    if (!arg1)
        return 1;
    
    int32_t* r3 = *arg1;
    *(arg1 + 0x35) = 2;
    arg1[0xd] = 0;
    *r3 &= 0xfffffffe;
    
    while (*r3 << 0x1f < 0)
    {
        if (sub_4428() - r0 > 5)
        {
            arg1[0x15] = 0x20;
            *(arg1 + 0x35) = 3;
            return 3;
        }
        
        r3 = *arg1;
    }
    
    int32_t r6_1 = arg1[6];
    int32_t r1_4 = arg1[9];
    int32_t r2_11 = arg1[1] | arg1[2] | arg1[3] | arg1[4] | arg1[5] | r6_1 | arg1[7] | arg1[8]
        | (0xf010803f & *r3);
    int32_t r1_5;
    
    if (r1_4 == 4)
    {
        int32_t r0_8 = arg1[0xb];
        int32_t r5_3 = arg1[0xa];
        *r3 = r2_11 | arg1[0xc] | r0_8;
        r1_5 = r5_3 | 4 | (r3[5] & 0xfffffff8);
        
        if (r0_8)
        {
            if (!r6_1)
            {
                if (r5_3 == 1)
                {
                    if (r0_8 == 0x1800000)
                    {
                    label_4ade:
                        arg1[0x15] = 0x40;
                        *(arg1 + 0x35) = 1;
                        return 1;
                    }
                }
                else if (r5_3 < 1 || r5_3 == 2)
                {
                label_4ad6:
                    
                    if (r0_8 << 7 < 0)
                        goto label_4ade;
                }
            }
            else if (r6_1 != 0x2000)
            {
                if (r5_3 <= 2)
                    goto label_4ade;
                
                if (r5_3 == 3)
                    goto label_4ad6;
            }
            else if (r5_3 <= 3)
                /* jump -> *(&data_4b08 + (r5_3 << 2)) */
        }
    }
    else
    {
        *r3 = r2_11;
        r1_5 = r1_4 | (r3[5] & 0xfffffff8);
    }
    
    r3[5] = r1_5;
    uint32_t r2_17 = (r3 - 0x10) / 0x18;
    uint32_t r1_7 = *(0x8006c70 + r2_17);
    arg1[0x17] = r1_7;
    void* r3_2 = r3 & 0xfffffc00;
    
    if (r2_17 > 3)
        r3_2 += 4;
    
    arg1[0x16] = r3_2;
    *(r3_2 + 8) = 0x3f << r1_7;
    arg1[0x15] = 0;
    *(arg1 + 0x35) = 1;
    return 0;
}

int32_t sub_4b24(int32_t* arg1, int32_t arg2, int32_t arg3, int32_t arg4)
{
    if (arg1[0xd] == 1)
        return 2;
    
    void* r6 = arg1[0x16];
    arg1[0xd] = 1;
    
    if (*(arg1 + 0x35) != 1)
    {
        arg1[0xd] = 0;
        return 2;
    }
    
    int32_t* r4_2 = *arg1;
    *(arg1 + 0x35) = 2;
    arg1[0x15] = 0;
    int32_t r7 = arg1[2];
    *r4_2 &= 0xfffbffff;
    r4_2[1] = arg4;
    
    if (r7 == 0x40)
    {
        r4_2[2] = arg3;
        r4_2[3] = arg2;
    }
    else
        r4_2[2] = arg2;
    
    int32_t r1 = arg1[0x17];
    
    if (r7 != 0x40)
        r4_2[3] = arg3;
    
    int32_t r2 = arg1[0x10];
    *(r6 + 8) = 0x3f << r1;
    *r4_2 |= 0x16;
    
    if (r2)
        *r4_2 |= 8;
    
    *r4_2 |= 1;
    return 0;
}

void sub_4ba0(int32_t* arg1)
{
    int32_t lr;
    int32_t var_4 = lr;
    int32_t* r7 = arg1[0x16];
    int32_t var_1c = 0;
    int32_t r3 = arg1[0x17];
    int32_t r5 = *r7;
    int32_t r2 = 8 << r3;
    int32_t r6 = *0x20000074;
    
    if (r2 & r5)
    {
        int32_t* r1_1 = *arg1;
        
        if (*r1_1 << 0x1d < 0)
        {
            *r1_1 &= 0xfffffffb;
            r7[2] = r2;
            arg1[0x15] |= 1;
        }
    }
    
    int32_t r2_1 = 1 << r3;
    
    if (r2_1 & r5 && *(*arg1 + 0x14) << 0x18 < 0)
    {
        r7[2] = r2_1;
        arg1[0x15] |= 2;
    }
    
    int32_t r2_2 = 4 << r3;
    
    if (r2_2 & r5 && **arg1 << 0x1e < 0)
    {
        r7[2] = r2_2;
        arg1[0x15] |= 4;
    }
    
    int32_t r2_3 = 0x10 << r3;
    
    if (r2_3 & r5)
    {
        int32_t* r1_7 = *arg1;
        
        if (*r1_7 << 0x1c < 0)
        {
            r7[2] = r2_3;
            int32_t r2_11 = *r1_7;
            
            if (!(*r1_7 & 0x40000))
            {
                if (r2_11 << 0x17 >= 0)
                    *r1_7 &= 0xfffffff7;
                
                goto label_4ca4;
            }
            
            r1_7 = r2_11 << 0xc;
            int32_t r2_15;
            
            if (r1_7 >= 0)
            {
            label_4ca4:
                r2_15 = arg1[0x10];
                
                if (r2_15)
                {
                    r2_15(arg1, r1_7);
                    r3 = arg1[0x17];
                }
            }
            else
            {
                r2_15 = arg1[0x12];
                
                if (r2_15)
                {
                    r2_15(arg1, r1_7);
                    r3 = arg1[0x17];
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    int32_t r2_4 = 0x20 << r3;
    
    if (!(r2_4 & r5))
    {
    label_4c28:
        
        if (arg1[0x15])
        {
            if (arg1[0x15] << 0x1f < 0)
            {
                int32_t* r2_7 = *arg1;
                *(arg1 + 0x35) = 5;
                *r2_7 &= 0xfffffffe;
                
                do
                {
                    bool cond:3_1 = var_1c + 1 <= r6 / 0x2580;
                    var_1c += 1;
                    
                    if (!cond:3_1)
                        break;
                } while (*r2_7 << 0x1f < 0);
                
                arg1[0xd] = 0;
                *(arg1 + 0x35) = 1;
            }
            
            int32_t r3_12 = arg1[0x13];
            
            if (r3_12)
                /* jump -> r3_12 */
        }
        
        return;
    }
    
    int32_t* r1_8 = *arg1;
    
    if (*r1_8 << 0x1b >= 0)
        goto label_4c28;
    
    r7[2] = r2_4;
    uint32_t r2_5 = *(arg1 + 0x35);
    
    if (r2_5 != 5)
    {
        int32_t r3_2 = *r1_8;
        
        if (!(*r1_8 & 0x40000))
        {
            int32_t r3_14 = r3_2 & 0x100;
            
            if (!r3_14)
            {
                r2_5 = *r1_8 & 0xffffffef;
                *r1_8 = r2_5;
                arg1[0xd] = r3_14;
                *(arg1 + 0x35) = 1;
            }
            
            goto label_4c1e;
        }
        
        r1_8 = r3_2 << 0xc;
        int32_t r3_3;
        
        if (r1_8 >= 0)
        {
            r3_3 = arg1[0x11];
            
            if (r3_3)
                r3_3(arg1, r1_8, r2_5);
        }
        else
        {
        label_4c1e:
            r3_3 = arg1[0xf];
            
            if (r3_3)
                r3_3(arg1, r1_8, r2_5);
        }
        goto label_4c28;
    }
    
    int32_t r0_7 = arg1[0x10];
    *r1_8 &= 0xffffffe9;
    r1_8[5] &= 0xffffff7f;
    
    if (r0_7 || arg1[0x12])
        *r1_8 &= 0xfffffff7;
    
    int32_t r1_10 = arg1[0x14];
    r7[2] = 0x3f << r3;
    arg1[0xd] = 0;
    *(arg1 + 0x35) = 1;
    
    if (r1_10)
        /* jump -> r1_10 */
}

void sub_4d4c(int32_t* arg1, int32_t* arg2)
{
    int32_t r8 = *arg2;
    int32_t r4 = 0;
    
    while (true)
    {
        int32_t r3_1 = 1 << r4;
        int32_t r2_1 = r8 & r3_1;
        
        if (r3_1 == r2_1)
        {
            int32_t r6_1 = arg2[1];
            int32_t r9_1 = r6_1 & 0xffffffef;
            int32_t r12_1 = r4 << 1;
            int32_t r3_3 = ~(3 << r12_1);
            int32_t r5_2 = arg2[2] << r12_1;
            
            if (r9_1 - 1 <= 1)
            {
                arg1[2] = arg2[3] << r12_1 | (arg1[2] & r3_3);
                arg1[1] = (r6_1 >> 4 & 1) << r4 | (arg1[1] & ~r2_1);
                arg1[3] = r5_2 | (arg1[3] & r3_3);
                
                if (r9_1 == 2)
                {
                    void* r9_4 = &arg1[r4 >> 3];
                    int32_t r7_21 = (r4 & 7) << 2;
                    *(r9_4 + 0x20) = arg2[4] << r7_21 | (*(r9_4 + 0x20) & ~(0xf << r7_21));
                }
            }
            else
                arg1[3] = r5_2 | (arg1[3] & r3_3);
            
            *arg1 = (r6_1 & 3) << r12_1 | (*arg1 & r3_3);
            
            if (r6_1 << 3 < 0)
            {
                int32_t var_2c_1 = 0;
                *0x40023844 |= 0x4000;
                int32_t var_2c_2 = *0x40023844 & 0x4000;
                int32_t r9_2 = (r4 & 3) << 2;
                int32_t r7_7 = *((r4 & 0xfffffffc) + 0x40013808) & ~(0xf << r9_2);
                
                if (arg1 != 0x40020000)
                    switch (arg1)
                    {
                        case 0x40020400:
                        {
                            r7_7 |= 1 << r9_2;
                            break;
                        }
                        case 0x40020800:
                        {
                            r7_7 |= 2 << r9_2;
                            break;
                        }
                        case 0x40020c00:
                        {
                            r7_7 |= 3 << r9_2;
                            break;
                        }
                        case 0x40021000:
                        {
                            r7_7 |= 4 << r9_2;
                            break;
                        }
                        case 0x40021400:
                        {
                            r7_7 |= 5 << r9_2;
                            break;
                        }
                        case 0x40021800:
                        {
                            r7_7 |= 6 << r9_2;
                            break;
                        }
                        case 0x40021c00:
                        {
                            r7_7 |= 7 << r9_2;
                            break;
                        }
                        case 0x40022000:
                        {
                            r7_7 |= 8 << r9_2;
                            break;
                        }
                        default:
                        {
                            int32_t r12_3;
                            
                            r12_3 = arg1 == 0x40022400 ? 9 : 0xa;
                            
                            r7_7 |= r12_3 << r9_2;
                        }
                    }
                
                *((r4 & 0xfffffffc) + 0x40013808) = r7_7;
                int32_t r3_12 = *0x40013c00;
                int32_t r5_9 = ~r2_1;
                int32_t r3_13;
                
                r3_13 = r6_1 << 0xf >= 0 ? r3_12 & r5_9 : r3_12 | r2_1;
                
                *0x40013c00 = r3_13;
                int32_t r3_14 = *0x40013c04;
                int32_t r3_15;
                
                r3_15 = r6_1 << 0xe >= 0 ? r3_14 & r5_9 : r3_14 | r2_1;
                
                *0x40013c04 = r3_15;
                int32_t r3_16 = *0x40013c08;
                int32_t r3_17;
                
                r3_17 = r6_1 << 0xb >= 0 ? r3_16 & r5_9 : r3_16 | r2_1;
                
                *0x40013c08 = r3_17;
                int32_t r3_18 = *0x40013c0c;
                r4 += 1;
                int32_t r3_19;
                
                r3_19 = r6_1 << 0xa >= 0 ? r3_18 & r5_9 : r3_18 | r2_1;
                
                *0x40013c0c = r3_19;
                
                if (r4 == 0x10)
                    break;
                
                continue;
            }
        }
        
        r4 += 1;
        
        if (r4 == 0x10)
            break;
    }
}

int32_t sub_4f90(void* arg1, int32_t arg2)
{
    if (arg2 & *(arg1 + 0x10))
        return 1;
    
    return 0;
}

void sub_4f9c(void* arg1, int32_t arg2, int32_t arg3)
{
    if (!arg3)
        arg2 <<= 0x10;
    
    *(arg1 + 0x18) = arg2;
}

int32_t sub_4fa4(int32_t* arg1)
{
    if (!arg1)
        return 1;
    
    uint32_t r3 = *(arg1 + 0x3d);
    
    if (!r3)
    {
        arg1[0xf] = r3 & 0xff;
        sub_3df8(arg1);
    }
    
    int32_t* r3_1 = *arg1;
    *(arg1 + 0x3d) = 0x24;
    *r3_1 &= 0xfffffffe;
    *r3_1 |= 0x8000;
    *r3_1 &= 0xffff7fff;
    uint32_t r0 = sub_5714();
    int32_t r1 = arg1[1];
    int32_t* r2_7;
    int32_t r3_9;
    int32_t r5_7;
    
    if (r1 > 0x186a0)
    {
        if (r0 > 0x3d08ff)
        {
            r2_7 = *arg1;
            uint32_t r5_11 = r0 / 0xf4240;
            r2_7[1] = (r2_7[1] & 0xffffffc0) | r5_11;
            int32_t r6_4 = arg1[2];
            r2_7[8] = (0x12c * r5_11 / 0x3e8 + 1) | (r2_7[8] & 0xffffffc0);
            r5_7 = r2_7[7] & 0xffff3000;
            
            if (r6_4)
            {
                int32_t r0_16 = ((r0 - 1) / (r1 * 0x19) + 1) & 0xfff;
                
                r3_9 = !r0_16 ? 1 : r0_16 | 0xc000;
            }
            else
            {
                int32_t r0_11 = ((r0 - 1) / (r1 * 3) + 1) & 0xfff;
                
                r3_9 = r0_11 ? r0_11 | 0x8000 : 1;
            }
            
        label_502e:
            r2_7[7] = r3_9 | r5_7;
            int32_t r1_2 = arg1[4];
            *r2_7 = arg1[7] | arg1[8] | (*r2_7 & 0xffffff3f);
            int32_t r3_14 = arg1[5];
            r2_7[2] = r1_2 | arg1[3] | (r2_7[2] & 0xffff7c00);
            r2_7[3] = r3_14 | arg1[6] | (r2_7[3] & 0xffffff00);
            *r2_7 |= 1;
            arg1[0x10] = 0;
            *(arg1 + 0x3d) = 0x20;
            arg1[0xc] = 0;
            *(arg1 + 0x3e) = 0;
            return 0;
        }
    }
    else if (r0 > 0x1e847f)
    {
        r2_7 = *arg1;
        uint32_t r3_3 = r0 / 0xf4240;
        r2_7[1] = (r2_7[1] & 0xffffffc0) | r3_3;
        r2_7[8] = (r3_3 + 1) | (r2_7[8] & 0xffffffc0);
        r3_9 = ((r0 - 1) / (r1 << 1) + 1) & 0xfff;
        
        if (r3_9 < 4)
            r3_9 = 4;
        
        r5_7 = r2_7[7] & 0xffff3000;
        goto label_502e;
    }
    return 1;
}

{

    r3[9] &= 0xffffffef;

        r5_2 = 0x71;
    }

        r5_2 = 0x61;
    }

        r5_2 = r6;
    
    r3_1[4] |= r5_2;
    *r3_1 |= 0x20000;
    arg1[0x20] = 0;

}

uint32_t sub_5c24(int32_t* arg1, int32_t arg2, int32_t arg3)
{
    if (!arg2 || !arg3)
        return 1;
    
    uint32_t r5_1 = *(arg1 + 0x81);
    
    if (r5_1 != 1 || arg1[0x20] == 1)
        return 2;
    
    int32_t* r0 = arg1[0x1d];
    int32_t r6 = *arg1;
    arg1[0x1a] = arg2;
    arg1[0x1b] = arg3;
    *(arg1 + 0x6e) = arg3;
    arg1[0x21] = 0;
    arg1[0x20] = r5_1;
    *(arg1 + 0x81) = 0x22;

    *r3_1 &= 0xfffffff7;
    *r3_1 |= arg2;
    *(arg1 + 0x3d) = 1;
    return 0;
}

int32_t sub_65ec(int32_t* arg1, int32_t* arg2)
{
    if (arg1[0xf] == 1)
        return 2;
    
    void* r3 = *arg1;
    *(arg1 + 0x3d) = 2;
    int32_t r4 = *arg2;
    arg1[0xf] = 1;
    *(r3 + 8) &= 0xffff0088;
    
    if (r4 == 0x40)
    {
        int32_t r5_5 = *(r3 + 0x20);
        int32_t r4_8 = arg2[1];
        int32_t r7_2 = arg2[3];
        *(r3 + 0x20) &= 0xfffffffe;
        *(r3 + 0x18) = (*(r3 + 0x18) & 0xffffff0f) | r7_2 << 4;
        *(r3 + 0x20) = (r5_5 & 0xfffffff5) | r4_8;
        *(r3 + 8) = (*(r3 + 8) & 0xffffff8f) | 0x47;
    }
    else if (r4 <= 0x40)
    {

            *(r3 + 8) = r4 | 7 | (*(r3 + 8) & 0xffffff8f);
        else
        {
            if (!r4)
                *(r3 + 8) = r4 | 7 | (*(r3 + 8) & 0xffffff8f);
            
            if (r4 == 0x20 || r4 == 0x30)
                *(r3 + 8) = r4 | 7 | (*(r3 + 8) & 0xffffff8f);
        }
    }
    else if (r4 == 0x60)
    {
        int32_t r5_3 = arg2[1];
        int32_t r6_1 = arg2[3];
        *(r3 + 0x20) &= 0xffffffef;
        int32_t r2_17 = (*(r3 + 0x20) & 0xffffff5f) | r5_3 << 4;
        *(r3 + 0x18) = (*(r3 + 0x18) & 0xffff0fff) | r6_1 << 0xc;
        *(r3 + 0x20) = r2_17;
        *(r3 + 8) = (*(r3 + 8) & 0xffffff8f) | 0x67;

    else

            int32_t r4_7 = arg2[1];
            int32_t r7_1 = arg2[3];

            *(r3 + 8) |= 0x77;
        }

            *(r3 + 8) |= 0x4000;
        }
    }

    arg1[0xf] = 0;
    return 0;
}

{

        *(r3 + 0x18);
        arg1[7] = 1;
        r3 = *arg1;
        arg1[7] = 0;
    }

        *(r3 + 0x18);

        r3 = *arg1;
        arg1[7] = 0;

        r3 = *arg1;
        arg1[7] = 0;
    }

        *(r3 + 0x1c);

        r3 = *arg1;

        sub_3214(arg1);
        r3 = *arg1;

        r3 = *arg1;

            result = arg1;
            r3 = *arg1;
        }

    *(r3 + 0x10) = 0xffffffdf;
    /* tailcall */
    return sub_6928();
}

        sub_3f80(arg1);
    }

    int32_t r5 = arg1[3];

        else

        r0_9 = LOWD(r0_8 * 0x19);

        *(r3_4 + 8) = (r2_29 << 1 & 0x1f0) + (r2_29 & 7) + ((r0_10 / 0x64) << 4);
    }

        else

    *(r3_4 + 0x14) &= 0xffffffd5;

    arg1[0xf] = 0;
    *(arg1 + 0x39) = 0x20;
    *(arg1 + 0x3a) = 0x20;
    return 0;
}

int32_t sub_6a74(int32_t* arg1, int32_t* arg2)
{

    int32_t r6 = arg2[4];
    int32_t r5 = arg2[5];
    int32_t r1 = arg2[6];

    {
        *arg1 = r2 | r3 | r7 | r4 | lr | r12 | r6 | r5 | r1 | (*arg1 & 0xffff8000);
        return 0;

    *arg1 = (*arg1 & 0xffff83ff) | r2 | r3 | r7;
    arg1[1] = r3_8;
    return 0;
}

int32_t sub_6af4(void* arg1, int32_t* arg2, int32_t arg3)
{

    int32_t r3_1 = (arg2[5] - 1) << 0x14;

    int32_t r5_2 = (arg2[2] - 1) << 8;
    int32_t r4_2 = (arg2[4] - 1) << 0x10;
    int32_t r1_1 = (arg2[6] - 1) << 0x18;
    int32_t r12_1 = *arg2 - 1;

    {
        *(arg1 + 8) = r3_1 | r7_1 | r12_1 | r6_2 | r5_2 | r4_2 | r1_1 | (*(arg1 + 8) & 0xf0000000);
        return 0;

    *(arg1 + 8) = r3_1 | r7_1 | (*(arg1 + 8) & 0xff0f0fff);

    return 0;
}

int32_t sub_6b84(void* arg1, int32_t* arg2, int32_t arg3)
{

    int32_t r0_1 = sub_4428();

    while (true)
    {
        if (arg3 == 0xffffffff)
        {
            do
                i = *(arg1 + 0x18) & 0x20;
             while (i);
            
            break;
        }
        
        i = *(arg1 + 0x18) & 0x20;
        
        if (!i)
            break;
        
        if (arg3 && sub_4428() - r0_1 <= arg3)
            continue;

    }
    
    return i;
}

void sub_6be8()
